name: audit-prep
description: Prepare Solidity projects for a security audit — test coverage, test quality, NatSpec docs, code hygiene, dependency health, best-practice enforcement, deployment readiness, and project documentation checks. Generates a scored Audit Readiness Report and optionally runs static analysis. Trigger on: "prepare for audit", "audit readiness", "pre-audit check", "audit prep", "NatSpec check", or any request to review a Solidity codebase before a security review.
